name: Rakim
bio: Rakim has a durable hip-hop catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: Rakim remains closely associated with Paid in Full and When I B on tha Mic, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like Paid in Full and When I B on tha Mic still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming keeps legacy rap records active long after their original chart run.
Playlist placement and cultural recognition help the biggest songs sustain repeat listening.
Licensing, sampling, and nostalgia-driven discovery continue to support long-tail earnings.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Rakim's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Rakim's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
